summary: Prepared a narrow repair plan for canonical PR #93869. The local patch narrows `data-code` encoding to QR/block-art payloads, preserves raw payload compatibility in the clipboard handler, and adds focused coverage for normal and truncated block-art copy behavior. No GitHub comments, labels, closes, merges, pushes, or new PRs were performed.

actions.reason: Canonical PR #93869 remains the right repair lane, but the branch needs this narrow QR copy-payload patch applied, then a branch refresh/rebase before rerunning the full changed gate.
#51868 should remain untouched as source proof and attribution context while #93869 carries the writable fix path.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #93869 so only QR/block-art code-copy payloads use the marked encoded representation. Ordinary code blocks keep raw `data-code`, while block-art payloads encode deterministically to survive DOM parsing and decode only in the chat clipboard handler. Add tests proving normal and truncated block-art quiet-zone spaces survive rendered DOM payloads and delegated copy behavior.
repair_candidate.pr_title: UI: render half-block QR output in web chat
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair the existing #93869 branch so only QR/block-art `data-code` payloads are encoded.
- Keep ordinary code block `data-code` payloads raw while retaining copy support for existing raw payloads.
- Decode marked block-art payloads only in the chat clipboard handler so leading quiet-zone spaces survive DOM parsing and copy for normal and truncated QR art.

## Credit
This continues to carry forward the fix idea and reproduction from @emg110 in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51868.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts` passed locally.
- `corepack pnpm format:check -- ui/src/ui/markdown.ts ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts` passed locally.
- `git diff --check` passed locally.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` passed clean locally.
- `corepack pnpm check:changed` currently requires a branch refresh/rebase first; local run failed in unrelated stale branch code at `src/mcp/channel-shared.ts(131,6)` for an unused `ClaudePermissionRequest`, and current `origin/main` no longer contains that unused type.
credit_notes: Preserve @emg110 credit from source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51868 in #93869 PR body and any release-note context.
Do not alter, close, or relabel #51868 in this repair job.
Existing #93869 branch already carries the replacement PR credit trail; keep that attribution visible.
